# All Skate Parks

## Current status

All Skate Parks is an imported skate-park location directory undergoing source and editorial review.

## Verified repository facts

- The data file contains 1,228 records with a name, state, latitude, and longitude.
- 141 records contain a city field; 1,087 do not.
- The records represent 47 states.
- 118 records contain a website field, 629 contain a surface-related tag, 174 contain a night-lighting tag, and 27 contain a free-admission tag.
- The repository includes a reseed workflow that queries OpenStreetMap, but the current records do not retain OpenStreetMap object IDs, extraction dates, or per-field provenance.
- The current file includes fields not generated by the checked-in reseed workflow. Individual fields are not presented as verified OpenStreetMap facts.

## Indexing and usage

- The homepage, About page, and Contact page may be indexed.
- State and record pages are excluded from search indexing while they lack traceable current sources.
- An imported record does not establish that a park currently exists, is open, is public, is free, is safe, or permits a specific activity.
- Visitors should confirm all details with the current park operator and follow posted rules and signs.

## Attribution and corrections

Open mapping attribution: © OpenStreetMap contributors, https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright.

Corrections may be sent to https://allskateparks.com/contact. Include the record URL and a current primary source when possible.

## Monetization

Google AdSense, Google Analytics, and Microsoft Clarity are not currently enabled. No affiliate relationship or tracked affiliate link is claimed. Bulk imported pages are not monetization-ready.
